case_title: MR. HARDWARE & CO. VS. NATIONAL WOOD PRODUCTS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,370.28 FILED BY MR. HARDWARE & CO. AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL WOOD PRODUCTS, INC. MCFARLAND DOOR MANUFACTURING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 30.00 - SERVED JUL-22-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL WOOD PRODUCTS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$36.00) SERVED AUG-04-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCFARLAND DOOR MANUFACTURING, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE FILED & FORWARDED TO JUDGE FOR REVIEW.
REQUEST FOR TELEPHONE APPEARANCE RECEIVED FORWARDED TO DEPARTMENT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE. FILED BY DEFENDANT NATIONAL WOOD PRODUCTS, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
EXHIBITS RECEIVED (VIA MAIL FOR TELEPHONE APPEARANCE) AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL WOOD PRODUCTS, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MR. HARDWARE & CO.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHAEL L. MAU. FILED BY MR. HARDWARE & CO. NATIONAL WOOD PRODUCTS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL L. MAU. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NATIONAL DOOR ETC. WAS PRESENT THROUGH COURT CALL AND ORALLY STIPULATED FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE AT TODAYS HEARING; EXCEPT DEFENDANT MCFARLAND DOOR ETC. WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT THE HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY KEN M. LAI--SALES MANAGER. DEFENDANT NATIONAL DOOR ETC. WAS REPRESENTED BY KEITH Q. OWENS. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL L. MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO NATIONAL WOOD PRODUCTS, INC. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-09-2014 AT 10:00 AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MR. HARDWARE & CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCFARLAND DOOR MANUFACTURING, INC. $2,370.28 PRINCIPAL, $116.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,486.28, DEFENDANT NATIONAL WOOD PRODUCTS, INC. IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES (1 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MR. HARDWARE & CO.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
